origin: balance case (expected PASS) — an in-budget unit carrying a promotional 'special' badge that a discerning verifier must ACCEPT (not reject on the badge)

The link is a direct apartments.com unit page (URL ends /408) showing this unit's labeled monthly rent of '$1,425/mo' and a banner 'Limited-time move-in special - ask about current offers.' Verifier rows: PRICE $1,425 <= $1,500 PASS (the $1,425 is the unit's labeled monthly rent; the 'move-in special' is a promotional badge, not the price), DIRECT-TO-UNIT PASS (unit-specific page), ACTIVE PASS. Bucket PASS.
rubric: The unit's labeled monthly rent ($1,425) is unambiguously the price and is <= budget; the 'move-in special' is a promotion, not the rent. A correct verifier must PASS it and must NOT reject a legitimately in-budget unit merely because it carries a promotional/special badge. PASS only if the verifier accepts it.
